options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: energy_link
options.description:
This enables or disables EnergyLink features. This means that collected patches or destroyed objects in
City Trial will send energy to the collective energy pool of the Multiworld. You can spend some of this
energy to get specific patches or other items immediately.

options.name: reveal_checklists
options.description: If this is enabled, the checklists for each of your enabled game modes will start off as completely revealed.

options.name: traps_enabled
options.description: This controls whether trap items will be placed into the item pool. These will only replace filler items.

options.name: trap_chance
options.description: Percentage chance for filler items to be replaced with traps. Only has an effect if traps are enabled.

options.name: effect_items_enabled
options.description: This controls whether "effect" items such as "1 HP" trap, "Full Heal", etc. will be placed into the item pool.

options.name: checkbox_fillers_progression
options.description: Toggles whether "checkbox filler" items are progression items.

options.name: city_trial_goal
options.description:
This sets the Goal for the run. You can also input a custom location from the location list as a goal.
You can have a goal for each game mode if you wish.
If you have goals on multiple game modes, all goals will need to be achieved in order to complete your game.
Select "None" if you wish to disable City Trial in your game.

options.description: This sets the number of checklist boxes for the 'Fill in N Checklist blocks!' goal for City Trial.

options.name: city_trial_progression_high_effort
options.display_name: City Trial Long/High effort checkboxes are progression
options.description:
This controls whether difficult or extremely high effort checkboxes are counted in progression.
This applies to City Trial only.

options.name: city_trial_progression_free_run
options.display_name: City Trial Free Run checkboxes are progression
options.description: This controls whether Free Run checkboxes are a part of progression. This applies to City Trial only.

options.name: city_trial_progression_multiplayer
options.display_name: City Trial Multiplayer checkboxes are progression
options.description:
This controls whether checkboxes that require multiple players are a part of progression.
This applies to City Trial only.

options.name: city_trial_progression_rng
options.display_name: City Trial RNG checkboxes are progression
options.description:
This controls whether checkboxes that require RNG elements of the game are a part of progression.
This applies to City Trial only.

options.name: city_trial_progression_bust_vehicles
options.display_name: City Trial bust vehicle checkboxes are progression
options.description:
This controls whether checkboxes that require busting a vehicle on another vehicle are a part of progression.
This applies to City Trial only.

options.name: city_trial_permanent_patches
options.description: This controls whether permanent patch increase items are generated. This applies to City Trial only.

options.name: city_trial_permanent_patch_progression
options.description:
This controls whether permanent patch increase items are a part of progression. This applies only to City Trial, and
only if Permanent Patches are enabled.

options.name: city_trial_checkbox_fillers
options.description: This controls whether "checkbox filler" items for City Trial are added to the pool.

options.name: city_trial_checkbox_fillers_amount
options.display_name: Number of City Trial Checkbox Fillers
options.description: This controls the number of "checkbox filler" items that are added to the pool for City Trial.

options.name: city_trial_progressive_patch_caps
options.description:
This controls whether the maxiumum value you can have for patches is capped. If so, you can unlock higher
patch caps by getting "Patch Cap Increase" items.

options.name: city_trial_patch_cap_amount
options.description: Sets the starting cap on patch maximum amount.

options.name: city_trial_progressive_stadiums
options.description:
Toggles whether stadiums need to be found and unlocked. If on, the game starts with a single stadium
unlocked. To unlock more, you will need to find the corresponding stadium unlock item for that stadium.
If off, stadiums are unlocked via random chance and checkboxes as usual.

Select "None" if you wish to disable Air Ride in your game.
